executive_summary: OFAC added 39 new entities to the SDN list under the IRAN-EO13902 program, primarily targeting vessels and entities involved in Iranian shipping and trade. The additions include companies and vessels from various countries, including China, Marshall Islands, and Panama. No entities were removed or updated.

notable_entities.name: Miraan
notable_entities.significance: Vessel added to the SDN list for its involvement in Iranian shipping activities

notable_entities.name: Costin Shipping Limited
notable_entities.significance: Entity added to the SDN list for its involvement in Iranian trade and shipping activities

notable_entities.name: Hengli Petrochemical Dalian Refinery Co., Ltd.
notable_entities.significance: Entity added to the SDN list for its involvement in Iranian petrochemical activities

risk_implications.description: The addition of 39 new entities to the SDN list under the IRAN-EO13902 program increases the risk of non-compliance for companies involved in shipping and trade activities with Iran
Financial institutions must be vigilant in screening transactions and customers to avoid inadvertently facilitating transactions with sanctioned entities

program_highlights.note: The IRAN-EO13902 program targets entities involved in Iranian shipping and trade activities, and the addition of 39 new entities highlights the ongoing efforts to disrupt these activities

geographic_hotspots.activity: Increased sanctions activity targeting entities involved in Iranian shipping and trade activities

compliance_recommendations: Conduct thorough due diligence on all customers and transactions to avoid inadvertently facilitating transactions with sanctioned entities
Implement effective screening and monitoring systems to detect and prevent transactions with sanctioned entities
Stay up-to-date with the latest sanctions developments and updates to ensure compliance with relevant regulations
